title: Generating an Optimal Sudoku Solver
scenario: Write a function that generates a solution to a given Sudoku puzzle. The input will be a 2D array representing the Sudoku board. The function should use recursion and backtracking to find a valid solution. The board is partially filled in, and the goal is to fill in the missing values. The input will be valid, but the solution may not be unique. The output should be a 2D array representing the solved board.
constraints: Must use a recursive approach with backtracking
Must include a helper function to check if a given number is valid in a given position

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct Sudoku logic using recursion and backtracking.
The function generates a valid solution to the given Sudoku puzzle.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of recursive calls.
